title: paeonia mascula var. ovatifolia
intro: Paeonia mascula var. ovatifolia, also known as the Persian peony or Turkish peony, is a variety of the Paeonia mascula plant, a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paeonia mascula var. ovatifolia include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, while also having antioxidant and antispasmodic effects. Paeonia mascula var. ovatifolia is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
